_source: Sampled directly from brand/logo.png and brand/brandguidelines.png pixel data (the guideline image's printed CMYK/RGB labels were illegible/garbled, so colors were color-picked from the actual rendered swatches and logo artwork instead).
name: MOMO

display.note: Monumental/Egyptian-feeling serif matching the guideline's bold display sample. Declared via mj-font for clients that honor web fonts (Gmail, Apple Mail, Outlook.com); falls back to the serif stack on Outlook desktop and other clients that ignore @font-face.

body.note: Clean modern sans matching the guideline's regular body sample, same web-font/fallback caveat as display.

logo.note: Maintain clear space around the logo of at least 25% of its rendered height on all sides (approximate default — the guideline's clearspace diagram wasn't numerically legible at source resolution).

button.note: Matches the guideline's gold pill-shaped 'EXPLORE' CTA button. Maps directly to MJML mj-button border-radius/background-color/color.

icon_style.note: Simple thin gold line icons for section markers/bullets, matching the guideline's iconography row.
